prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains specifically to regulations and actions taken by the UK government regarding unsafe cladding in England and does not mention any relevance or applicability to Scotland. Housing and building safety regulations are devolved matters in Scotland, thus making this directive not applicable to Scotland.
